websites.sectionIntro: Live sites and tools. NWI Fun Ball embeds the production homepage; other entries reflect stacks from your local project folders (Linda, fan player, and this repo).

items.title: Cesars Portfolio (this site)

items.title: NWI Fun Ball (nwifunball.com)
items.summary: Public site for NWI Fun Ball: event storytelling, QR-friendly flows, Stripe payments, transactional email via Resend, and Neon serverless Postgres.

items.title: MZ Linda's East Door
items.summary: Marketing and experience site (mzdivias-creations) built with Next.js App Router, Framer Motion, Lenis, and Zustand — polished motion and layout for MZ Linda’s East Door.
items.imageAlt: Placeholder icon — L mark and chat bubble

items.title: 3D Fan Player
items.summary: Flutter app for 3D holographic POV LED fans (3D-PD42-1024-640 class): uploads video or GIF, converts to 1024×640 RGB565 frames at 10 FPS, packages .bin payloads, and streams playlists to the fan over Wi‑Fi (TCP control + upload ports) — the format the hardware expects for persistence-of-vision playback, not a generic glTF web viewer.

quote.text: We are the music makers, and we are the dreamers of dreams

games.sectionEyebrow: Stream-first · TikTok Live chat + Twitch placeholders

items.title: Tarot card reading (stream app)
items.summary: Stream-friendly tarot overlay: TikTok Live chat drives tips, queues, and draws from the deck you upload — with architecture and UI hooks reserved for Twitch chat integration when you wire it in. OBS-friendly layout stays readable on camera.

items.title: Chatling Ranch
items.summary: Pokémon-style social sim built for live audiences: TikTok Live chat (and Twitch chat placeholders) can feed votes, gifts, and commands into the ranch while players raise Chatlings and grow the economy metagame.
items.detail: Chatling Ranch is the largest world in your lineup — a creature ranch sim where players raise collectible Chatlings, socialize in real time, and push deep progression systems. Streams extend that loop: TikTok Live chat is the primary integration path today, with clear placeholders in the stack for Twitch chat so viewers on either platform can eventually steer events, gifts, or minigames. Core gameplay is built around generations: pairing, marriage-style bonds, and offspring so families grow into babies and grandbabies with inherited traits. The economy ties into land ownership (buy and expand your plot), housing upgrades that change what you can host and how fast you progress, and a cosmetics layer for both ranch flair and creature presentation. Each Chatling lives on a roughly two-week lifecycle, so care schedules, breeding windows, and social events stay meaningful. Art and trainer concepts also live in your Chatlings asset folder on the backup drive; the full gameplay codebase is slated to sync from the repo you add next.
highlights: Creature collection and ranch life in a Pokémon-inspired social loop.
Breeding and lineages across generations — babies, grandbabies, and marriage / pairing for family trees.
Buy land, expand the ranch, and upgrade housing to unlock higher-tier play.
Cosmetic shop for ranch and creature customization.
~Two-week lifespan per Chatling so timing, care, and breeding decisions matter.
Live layer: TikTok Live chat integrations plus Twitch chat placeholders for a unified stream stack.
Real-time multiplayer energy with chat-forward systems (React, Node.js, WebSockets).

items.title: Dungeon Master Lite
items.summary: Lightweight dungeon master companion for interactive streams: chat-first UI wired for TikTok Live, with Twitch chat integration placeholders beside it. Dice-friendly flows plus AI-assisted narration once you supply an API key so prompts and story beats stay reactive to what chat does on air.
items.iconAlt: Dungeon Master Lite app icon — neon d20 with TikTok motif

items.title: Choose your own adventure
items.summary: Choose-your-own-adventure built for live streaming: TikTok Live chat carries votes and branch picks on-air, Twitch chat hooks are scaffolded for parity, and an AI API key generates the next beat from the path the audience selects — same interaction model as Dungeon Master Lite, tuned for branching fiction.
items.demoNotes: Pilot scene: click a choice to branch. Replace files in public/demos/cyoa-pilot/ with your Godot Web export.

contact.headline: Let’s build something
contact.body: Open to freelance and full-time roles that need strong UI, performance, and clear communication. Replace the placeholder email with yours before you ship.
